execute_steps: Run segment-tracker.test.ts gradient lookup tests (5 tiers)
Verify getRetentionWindow(30) returns all 12 (infinity sentinel)
Verify getRetentionWindow(60) returns last 8
Verify getRetentionWindow(75) returns last 4
Verify getRetentionWindow(85) returns last 2
Verify getRetentionWindow(95) returns last 1
Run segment-tracker.test.ts empty case tests (0 completed segments)
Verify getRetentionWindow(75) with 0 completed segments returns empty array
Run tree-compactor.test.ts computeCompressionScope ratio tests
Verify estimatedAfterTokens / denominator within [0.2, 0.5]
Verify at least 1 segment included
Run tree-compactor.test.ts 'all segments too small' test
Verify all segments returned when ratio never reaches 20%
Verify all history segments included
test_execution.evidence: tree-compactor.test.ts — 'small dataset — ratio stays below ratioMin' passes

execute_steps: Run tree-compactor.test.ts 'first segment exceeds max' test
Verify 1 segment is included even when ratio > 50%
test_execution.evidence: tree-compactor.test.ts — 'accepts 1 segment when ratio > ratioMax' passes

execute_steps: Run phase4-integration.test.ts TC-3-01 tests
Verify restoreState preserves last tree entry with correct groups
Verify restoreState picks last of multiple entries
Run phase4-integration.test.ts TC-3-02 validateTreeOutput guard tests
Verify rejects missing nodeId
Verify rejects non-array top-level
Verify rejects invalid segId
Run phase4-integration.test.ts TC-3-03 initial tree validation test
Verify accepts valid group+leaf tree from JSON with long summaries
Run context-handler.test.ts tree injection tests
Verify output contains recall prompt (ic-recall-prompt)

Verify compressedSegIds filtering works correctly
Run tree-compactor.test.ts AC-6 low usage skip test

Verify isCompressing() remains false
Run tree-compactor.test.ts AC-6 usage >= 50% test
Verify triggerCompression with usagePercent=50 passes guard
Verify compression flow proceeds (blocked only by insufficient segments)
Code review: verify handleCompressionFailure retry+fallback logic in tree-compactor.ts
Verify MAX_RETRY_COUNT=1 in COMPRESSION_CONFIG
Verify retry triggers ruleBasedFallback on second failure
Verify fallbackUsed flag set and tree structure correct
test_execution.evidence: Code review confirmed retry/fallback at lines 957-985. Full end-to-end test requires child_process mocking.
